name: core.openwop.connections.netsuite
description: Oracle NetSuite connection pack (RFC 0095) — OAuth2 provider for the NetSuite SuiteTalk REST API (ERP / finance). Reach is `openapi`: NetSuite has no first-party global MCP server, and its REST base + OAuth hosts are PER-ACCOUNT (`https://{account}.suitetalk.api.netsuite.com`), supplied per connection via instanceUrlTemplate (the schema's own NetSuite example). Carries NO secret; the operator supplies the integration/client credentials host-side (ADR 0024 §7). Bound by ADR 0149 lib.finance.invoice-ap (post to ERP).
